news.title:
India's CAD widened to $13.2B in Q3FY26 vs $11.3B YoY due to higher MTD.
Net outflows under FDI also contributed to the CAD increase.
news.summary:
India's CAD widened to $13.2B in Q3FY26 vs $11.3B YoY due to higher MTD.
Net outflows under FDI also contributed to the CAD increase.

news.title:
ICRA warns Strait of Hormuz tensions may hike crude oil volatility, impacting India’s energy bill and OMC margins.
India’s crude (50%) & LNG (54%) imports depend on Hormuz, exposing risks despite efforts in diversified sourcing.
news.summary:
ICRA warns Strait of Hormuz tensions may hike crude oil volatility, impacting India’s energy bill and OMC margins.
India’s crude (50%) & LNG (54%) imports depend on Hormuz, exposing risks despite efforts in diversified sourcing.

news.title:
India unlikely to intervene after US imposes 126% duty on solar module exports.
Indian manufacturers advised to seek legal recourse and appeal in appropriate forums.
news.summary:
India unlikely to intervene after US imposes 126% duty on solar module exports.
Indian manufacturers advised to seek legal recourse and appeal in appropriate forums.

news.title:
Icra projects road construction pace to slow through FY27 due to weak project awards.
Construction by ministry expected at 9,000-10,000 km in FY26-27, down from 10,660 km in FY25.
news.summary:
Icra projects road construction pace to slow through FY27 due to weak project awards.
Construction by ministry expected at 9,000-10,000 km in FY26-27, down from 10,660 km in FY25.

news.title:
GDP growth slowed to 7.4% in Q3 due to govt spending cuts.
Economists project FY26 GDP at 7.5%, above RBI's 7.3% estimate.
news.summary:
GDP growth slowed to 7.4% in Q3 due to govt spending cuts.
Economists project FY26 GDP at 7.5%, above RBI's 7.3% estimate.

news.title:
India's CV industry surged 27% YoY in Jan 2026, driven by GST rate cut and increased freight activity, per ICRA.
M&HCV retail volumes grew 15.4% YoY; LCVs rose 14.9%, but high funding costs remain a challenge, ICRA noted.
news.summary:
India's CV industry surged 27% YoY in Jan 2026, driven by GST rate cut and increased freight activity, per ICRA.
M&HCV retail volumes grew 15.4% YoY; LCVs rose 14.9%, but high funding costs remain a challenge, ICRA noted.

news.title:
ICRA forecasts Indian aviation net losses to reduce to Rs 110-120B in FY27.
Domestic passenger traffic is expected to grow 6-8% in FY27, aiding recovery.
news.summary:
ICRA forecasts Indian aviation net losses to reduce to Rs 110-120B in FY27.
Domestic passenger traffic is expected to grow 6-8% in FY27, aiding recovery.

news.title:
ICRA projects India's GDP growth to moderate to 7.2% in Q3FY26 from 8.2% in Q2FY26.
The slowdown is due to weaker services and agriculture growth, despite better industrial performance.
news.summary:
ICRA projects India's GDP growth to moderate to 7.2% in Q3FY26 from 8.2% in Q2FY26.
The slowdown is due to weaker services and agriculture growth, despite better industrial performance.

news.title:
ICRA estimates new risk-based deposit rules could cut bank profits by ₹2,000-12,000 crore.
Return on Assets (RoA) may drop by 1-4 basis points due to increased premiums.
news.summary:
ICRA estimates new risk-based deposit rules could cut bank profits by ₹2,000-12,000 crore.
Return on Assets (RoA) may drop by 1-4 basis points due to increased premiums.

news.title:
ICRA Ltd announced its schedule for analyst/investor meetings in February 2026.
Meetings include one-on-one and group events, both virtual and in-person, with entities like ICICI Prudential.
news.summary:
ICRA Ltd announced its schedule for analyst/investor meetings in February 2026.
Meetings include one-on-one and group events, both virtual and in-person, with entities like ICICI Prudential.

news.title:
ICRA highlights FTA with EU will boost Indian exports in textiles, pharma, chemicals, agri, leather, and marine products.
EU continues as a key trade partner for India, enhancing opportunities for various sectors under the FTA.
news.summary:
ICRA highlights FTA with EU will boost Indian exports in textiles, pharma, chemicals, agri, leather, and marine products.
EU continues as a key trade partner for India, enhancing opportunities for various sectors under the FTA.

news.title:
India's copper demand is expected to grow 10-12% annually over two years, says ICRA.
Growth moderates from 14-15% in early FY26 due to higher metal prices affecting demand.
news.summary:
India's copper demand is expected to grow 10-12% annually over two years, says ICRA.
Growth moderates from 14-15% in early FY26 due to higher metal prices affecting demand.

news.title:
India's Russian crude imports reduced by 70% in January but won't hit zero soon due to scheduled cargoes and logistical constraints.
Analysts note replacing Russian oil could raise India's import bill by $2.7B annually. Venezuela emerges as a viable alternative.
news.summary:
India's Russian crude imports reduced by 70% in January but won't hit zero soon due to scheduled cargoes and logistical constraints.
Analysts note replacing Russian oil could raise India's import bill by $2.7B annually. Venezuela emerges as a viable alternative.

news.title:
Union Budget 2026-27 raises FY26 capex by 9% to ₹12.2T, boosting cement demand.
Effective capex, including grants, grows 11% to ₹17.1T, aiding cement sector growth.
news.summary:
Union Budget 2026-27 raises FY26 capex by 9% to ₹12.2T, boosting cement demand.
Effective capex, including grants, grows 11% to ₹17.1T, aiding cement sector growth.

news.title:
ICRA Ltd's Q3 revenue grew 35.3%, while 9M FY2026 revenue rose 17.4%.
Q3 PBT increased 10.9%, with 15.4% growth in 9M FY2026; acquisition impacted results.
news.summary:
ICRA Ltd's Q3 revenue grew 35.3%, while 9M FY2026 revenue rose 17.4%.
Q3 PBT increased 10.9%, with 15.4% growth in 9M FY2026; acquisition impacted results.

news.title:
ICRA Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹424.7 cr and PAT of ₹90.9 cr.
Fintellix acquisition completed for ₹49.1 cr; ₹6.9 cr exceptional cost due to new Labour Codes.
news.summary:
ICRA Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹424.7 cr and PAT of ₹90.9 cr.
Fintellix acquisition completed for ₹49.1 cr; ₹6.9 cr exceptional cost due to new Labour Codes.

news.title:
RBI's revised PSL norms push banks towards direct lending, reducing reliance on NBFCs. External audits aim to curb misclassification and double counting.
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank faced provisions due to PSL gaps. Total PSL book exceeds Rs 65 lakh crore, with MSME loans at Rs 31.3 lakh crore in FY25.
news.summary:
RBI's revised PSL norms push banks towards direct lending, reducing reliance on NBFCs. External audits aim to curb misclassification and double counting.
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank faced provisions due to PSL gaps. Total PSL book exceeds Rs 65 lakh crore, with MSME loans at Rs 31.3 lakh crore in FY25.

news.title:
ICRA projects Indian aviation industry losses to rise to Rs 18,000 cr in FY26.
Key factors include slowing domestic traffic growth, higher jet fuel prices, and depreciating rupee.
news.summary:
ICRA projects Indian aviation industry losses to rise to Rs 18,000 cr in FY26.
Key factors include slowing domestic traffic growth, higher jet fuel prices, and depreciating rupee.

news.title:
India's two-wheeler industry rebounded in Dec'25 with 38% YoY wholesale growth, driven by policy gains and urban demand.
ICRA projects FY26 growth of 6-9%, aided by GST 2.0, exports (+24.1% 9M), and rising electric two-wheeler sales (+32.8% YoY).
news.summary:
India's two-wheeler industry rebounded in Dec'25 with 38% YoY wholesale growth, driven by policy gains and urban demand.
ICRA projects FY26 growth of 6-9%, aided by GST 2.0, exports (+24.1% 9M), and rising electric two-wheeler sales (+32.8% YoY).

news.title:
India's core infra sectors grew 3.7% in Dec, a 4-month high, led by fertiliser and cement output.
ICRA expects IIP growth to moderate to 4.5-5% in Dec from 6.7% in Nov.
news.summary:
India's core infra sectors grew 3.7% in Dec, a 4-month high, led by fertiliser and cement output.
ICRA expects IIP growth to moderate to 4.5-5% in Dec from 6.7% in Nov.
